Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses T Defts' Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Van T. Nguyen, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Regents of the University of California.
No other appearance.

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendants Regents Of The University Of California, Nathan Bass' Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendants' form interrogatories ' general, form interrogatories ' employment, special interrogatories, and request for production within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
